quotes: Tone may flex slightly by context; core voice never changes.

rules.intent: Maintain the empathetic, clear, and confident brand identity of Lisraya across all written materials.
rules.rule_text: The brand voice must remain consistent across communications, balancing confidence (stating first-of-its-kind significance directly without sensationalism), warmth (expressing genuine empathy regarding DM's impact with patients at the center, without being overly emotional), and clarity (using plain, respectful, and accurate language). Tone may flex slightly by context, but core voice never changes.
